name: Stewed Chicken
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Canned Italian stewed tomatoes, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken in a baking dish.
2. Top with tomatoes and their juice, mushrooms, onions, and seasonings.
3. Cover tightly with foil.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour or until the chicken is done.
5. Remove from oven and sprinkle with mozzarella cheese.
6. Cover with foil until the cheese melts.
